title: Indigo Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Indigo Paints is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Indigo Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indigo Paints:
Indigo Paints is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints!
